_meta.note: Frozen Figma variable defs for the Toggle/Switch page node. Interactive halo shadows (hover/focus/pressed) are 2px spread, 0 blur rings.

variables.UI Component/.Toggle/Label: Font(family: "Global/Font Family", style: Regular, size: loop/toggle/label/font Size, weight: loop/toggle/label/font weight, lineHeight: loop/toggle/label/line height, letterSpacing: loop/toggle/label/letter spacing)
variables.-loop interactive shadows/Hovered: Effect(type: DROP_SHADOW, color: Domain/Interactive/On Light/Hover, offset: (0, 0), radius: 0, spread: 2)
variables.-loop interactive shadows/Focused: Effect(type: DROP_SHADOW, color: Domain/Interactive/On Light/Focused, offset: (0, 0), radius: 0, spread: 2)
variables.-loop interactive shadows/Pressed: Effect(type: DROP_SHADOW, color: Domain/Interactive/On Light/Pressed, offset: (0, 0), radius: 0, spread: 2)
